items.promptRaw: 高速道路での運転で正しいのはどれか。
optionsRaw: A 路肩で停車し、乗員を乗降する
B 非常駐車帯で貨物の積み下ろしをする
C 減速車線または加速車線で、追い越しや停車をする
D 緊急でない場合、非常車線で運転や停車をしてはいけない
items.correctAnswerRaw: 緊急でない場合、非常車線で運転や停車をしてはいけない
items.promptTranslated: Which of the following is correct when driving on an expressway?
items.translatedPrompt: Which of the following is correct when driving on an expressway?
optionsTranslated: A. Stop on the shoulder to let passengers get on and off
B. Load or unload cargo in the emergency parking area
C. Overtake or stop in the deceleration or acceleration lane
D. Unless it is an emergency, you must not drive or stop in the emergency lane
translatedOptions: A. Stop on the shoulder to let passengers get on and off
B. Load or unload cargo in the emergency parking area
C. Overtake or stop in the deceleration or acceleration lane
D. Unless it is an emergency, you must not drive or stop in the emergency lane
items.correctAnswerTranslated: Unless it is an emergency, you must not drive or stop in the emergency lane
items.translatedCorrectAnswer: Unless it is an emergency, you must not drive or stop in the emergency lane
